themes.reasoning_notes: Artifact Equipment with living weapon; its main deckbuilding identity is as an Equipment that supplies its own wielder.
Gives a single creature +3/+1 and haste, supporting suited-up threat plans and fast commander damage lines.
Living weapon creates a Germ token on entry, but the token is mainly a carrier rather than the card's core theme.
